title: viola bungeana
intro: Viola bungeana, also known as the Chinese pimpernel or Chinese heartsease, is a type of flowering plant in the viola genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Viola bungeana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Viola bungeana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
